_comment: Rejection envelope produced by particle-api-js@12.0.0's Agent._promiseResponse when /oauth/token responds with an mfa_required body (HTTP 4xx). The thrown reason is an Error instance; this fixture captures its enumerable own properties so tests can reconstitute it via Object.assign(new Error(message), fixture). Source: node_modules/particle-api-js/lib/src/Agent.js lines 40-84.
message: HTTP error 403 from https://api.particle.io/oauth/token - Multi-factor authentication required
errorDescription: HTTP error 403 from https://api.particle.io/oauth/token - Multi-factor authentication required
